escalation.rationale: US-Iran war enters day 85 with stalled peace talks, Trump preparing potential strikes, and multiple active Middle East fronts including Pakistan train bombing.

ticker_items: US-Iran talks stall as Trump cancels holiday plans amid strike preparations
Train bombing in Pakistan's Balochistan kills 24 soldiers, 50+ wounded
Ukrainian drones strike Russian oil terminal in Krasnodar region
Israeli strikes kill 6 paramedics, child in southern Lebanon ceasefire violations
China reportedly planning Xi Jinping visit to North Korea

eastern_europe.description: Drone attack on oil facilities in Russia's key Black Sea port causes fire.
Ukrainian drone attack caused fire at Russian oil terminal overnight

middle_east.description: Israeli strikes kill six paramedics and a child despite ceasefire agreement.
Israeli airstrikes killed 6 paramedics and 1 child despite ceasefire agreement
Israeli attack killed three family members including infant
Suicide car bombing attack on train carrying military personnel

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

ukraine.text: Germany's proposal of associate EU membership for Ukraine is 'unfair'
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Major gaps remain in US talks
middle_east.speaker: Tehran officials
middle_east.title: Iranian government

middle_east.text: US demands for ending war are excessive
middle_east.speaker: Tehran
middle_east.title: Iranian government

middle_east.text: Iran has no trust in the United States and will never retreat from its national rights
middle_east.speaker: Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf
middle_east.title: Iran Parliament Speaker

middle_east.text: There were even odds that Washington would secure a 'good' deal with Iran or renew its bombing campaign
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Army chief Asim Munir arrives in Tehran for US-Iran mediation efforts. Pakistan has deployed 8,000 troops and military assets to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty.
Enters 'total defence' mode in response to Russia threat, upgrading air raid shelters and increasing civil defense personnel. Government urging citizens to stock emergency supplies for potential war.
Reports indicate China secretly trained Russian troops who have since fought in Ukraine. Xi Jinping planning visit to North Korea to revive US denuclearization talks.

financial.notes: No significant financial market movements reported in today's headlines.

update_log.text: Pakistan train bombing in Balochistan kills 24 soldiers, Baloch separatists claim responsibility
Pakistani Army Chief completes Tehran talks as US-Iran diplomatic efforts intensify
Trump indicates even odds between Iran deal or renewed strikes as negotiations stall
Ukrainian drone attack triggers fire at Russian oil terminal in Krasnodar region
Israeli strikes kill 6 paramedics and child in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
Trump returns to White House early as US military placed on standby for potential Iran strikes.
Pakistani army chief arrives in Tehran as mediation efforts intensify between US and Iran.
Oil facilities in Novorossiysk on fire following overnight Ukrainian drone attack.
Tulsi Gabbard announces resignation as US intelligence chief over Iran war disagreements.
